title: Verify Cancellation Flow with Incentive Offer Acceptance
description: Test the end-to-end cancellation flow where the user rejects the reminder, persists in canceling, and accepts the discount offer.
preconditions: User has an active trial and is in the experiment cohort.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 3. On the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click the secondary action 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
4. On the 'Incentive' offer pop-up, click the primary action 'Grab Offer' or similar.
5. Complete the payment for the discounted amount.

expected_result: The user's first month subscription is successfully updated to the discounted price. The trial remains active for the remaining duration. The 'cancel-clicked' event is fired from the discount pop-up.
